name: NCT03430037: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Women
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for a phase 2 randomized, placebo-controlled fisetin study in older women; the 2026-06-30 v2 API snapshot lists enrolling-by-invitation status and no posted results section.

provenance.note: Registry source created from the retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API snapshot.
